name: Memory Keeper
description: Offline custodian that corrects, reconciles, and consistency-checks memories across Nick's Obsidian vault, logging every change.
_mcp_note: Intentionally empty. Fully offline — uses only native file tools (Read/Write/Edit/Glob/Grep) on the Obsidian vault. No web, no OAuth, no cloud services.

obsidian_vault.note: Search exhaustively before editing; a single fact often spans many notes.

context_buckets._note: None. Working memory is the Obsidian vault itself, accessed via file tools.

trigger.description: Invoked when Nick wants to correct a memory, resolve a contradiction, or sweep the vault for inconsistencies.
